cards.afterText: If the opposing fighter has 1 health, defeat that fighter.
cards.title: monster part: Acquire the Head

cards.afterText: The opposing fighter cannot leave their space until the start of your next turn
cards.title: monster part: Acquire the legs

cards.afterText: Victor cannot be attacked by the opposing fighter until the start of your next turn.
cards.title: monster part: Acquire The arms

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, your opponent must discard cards of their choice until they have a card hand of 4.
cards.title: monster part: Acquire the torso

cards.basicText: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck.  You may add one MONSTER PART card or LIGHTNING STORM card to your hand if there is one.  Shuffle the remaining cards and place them on the bottom of your deck.  Move Victor up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: unhallowed damps of the grave

cards.duringText: If Victor and The Monster are in the same zone, you may choose to defeat Victor. If you do, this card's value is 8 instead.
cards.title: revenge against the creator

cards.afterText: If your fighter is the Monster, deal 1 damage to all adjacent fighters
cards.duringText: If your fighter is Victor, you may BLIND BOOST this card.
cards.title: disastrous consequences

cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. The opponent discards 1 card. If you won the combat, you may look at their hand and choose which card is discarded instead.
cards.title: dangerous knowledge no mortal should wield

cards.immediateText: Cancel the effects on an opponent's cards
cards.title: feint

cards.afterText: Move your fighter up to 4 spaces. You may move through opposing fighters.
cards.title: shunned by society

cards.afterText: Draw 2 cards and then place 1 card from your hand on the top or bottom of your deck.  You may deal 1 damage to your fighter to repeat this effect.
cards.title: Ruinous obsession

cards.basicText:
If all four MONSTER PART cards are in your discard pile, remove them from the game and place the Monster in any space in Victor's zone.
If the Monster is already in play, gain an action and add +1 to the value of all of the Monster's cards until the beginning of your next turn.
cards.title: lightning storm

cards.basicText:
Choose one: 
- place Victor in any space in his zone. Draw 2 cards.
- place the Monster adjacent to an opposing fighter in his zone. Deal 2 damage to that fighter.
cards.title: haunting remorse

hero.name: The monster
hero.specialAbility:
The Monster does not begin in play.  He must be created first.

The Monster is also considered a HERO.

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote:
"As I looked on him, his countenance expressed the utmost of malice and treachery."
                                                 -Mary Shelley

hero.name: victor frankenstein
hero.specialAbility: At the beginning of your turn, if Victor is in play, look at the top card of your deck. You may place it on the bottom of your deck.

ruleCards.content:
The Monster does not begin the game in play.

In order to place the Monster in play, you must get all 4 "Monster Part" cards into your discard pile.  
Then you must play the "LIghtning Storm" scheme card.

The Monster may only be created once per game and is removed from the game if defeated.
ruleCards.title: creating the monster

ruleCards.content: A NEW REWORKED VERSION OF THIS DECK IS AVAILABLE:  CHECK IT OUT HERE: https://unmatched.cards/decks/zk2x
ruleCards.title: Rework available

sidekick.name: the monster
sidekick.quote:
"I will pioneer a new way, explore unknown powers, and unfold to the world the deepest mysteries of creation."
                                                 -Mary Shelley

name: Victor Frankenstein
